differential_diagnoses: Chronic portal vein thrombosis secondary to prior abdominal trauma
next_steps: Perform a liver biopsy with specialized stains for parasitic ova and fibrosis patterns
Obtain a transthoracic echocardiogram to rule out right-sided heart failure or constrictive pericarditis
Check serum ceruloplasmin and 24-hour urinary copper to rule out Wilson's disease
Perform serologic testing for Schistosoma species
Consult interventional radiology to evaluate potential for transjugular intrahepatic portosystemic shunt or mesenteric angiography
Maintain hemodynamic monitoring and initiate nutritional support
